# Hard74 Async36 CmdPreview4 Contract

## Hard 74
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.74 and absolute trigger to 75k so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Async 36
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.36 so reclaim starts earlier

## Cmd preview 4
TUI command/write previews default to 4 lines for denser chrome

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool-call vitest
